name: Scary Little Prankster
author: Poki
description: In "Scary Little Prankster" you'll dive headfirst into a world of laughter, chaos, and epic pranks in this choices game. Scary Teacher's daughter is out to conquer the art of pranking through choices, and she's turning the whole town into her playground. Get ready with this prank game to be swept away in a whirlwind of laughter and mayhem as you assist her through choices in creating the most , side-splitting, and absurd pranks imaginable! How do I play Scary Little Prankster? Move: WASD, Arrow Keys, or click and drag with the mouse Skip Cutscene: E Pause: Escape Who created Scary Little Prankster? Scary Little Prankster is created by ZnK Games. Play their other games on Poki: Hide and Seek , Prankster 3D , Pull the String , Scary Teacher 3D , and School Escape! ! How can I play Scary Little Prankster for free? You can play Scary Little Prankster for free on Poki. Can I play Scary Little Prankster on mobile devices and desktop? Scary Little Prankster can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
